name: clean-docs-update
description: Docs-only update with no logic change — low scope, low complexity, low sensitivity. Should pass with risk 8.

pr.title: Update README with local dev setup steps
pr.author: priya
pr.description: Adds a 'Local development' section to the root README explaining how to run the monorepo with pnpm. No code changes.

files.README.md:
# Autogate

Automated PR gating for your monorepo.

## Local development

1. Install dependencies: `pnpm install`
2. Build packages: `pnpm build`
3. Run tests: `pnpm test`

Requires Node 20+.

agentResponse.summary: The change adds documentation only. Scope is minimal (one markdown file), complexity is negligible (prose), and sensitivity is zero (no code or config touched). riskContribution is 8.
